mapper.select: SELECT code AS `key` ,name_short AS `value` FROM fx_country WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort_order
SELECT COUNT(code) FROM fx_country WHERE deleted = 0

SELECT code AS code ,name AS name ,currency_code AS currencyCode ,name_en AS nameEn ,name_short AS nameShort ,sort_order AS sortOrder FROM fx_country WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort_order
LIMIT 0, #{size} LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
SELECT code AS code ,name AS name ,currency_code AS currencyCode ,sort_order AS sortOrder FROM fx_country WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort_order

SELECT code AS code ,name AS name ,currency_code AS currencyCode ,name_en AS nameEn ,name_short AS nameShort ,sort_order AS sortOrder ,deleted AS deleted ,created_at AS createdAt ,created_by AS createdBy ,updated_at AS updatedAt ,updated_by AS updatedBy FROM fx_country WHERE code = #{code}
